The classification of Pityothamnus angustifolius includes its kingdom as Plantae and its order as Boraginales. Pityothamnus angustifolius is further classified as a species within the genus Pityothamnus. Its classification also includes its family, Boraginaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as borage.
